title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Max Life Insurance - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Max Life Insurance - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Max Life Insurance in Hyderabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Max Life Insurance:
Max Life Insurance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Life Insurance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
